preCommit.description: Block commits with TODO or FIXME comments
preCommit.command: python -c "import subprocess,sys; files=subprocess.check_output(['git','diff','--cached','--name-only'],text=True).splitlines(); bad=[f for f in files if any(kw in open(f).read() for kw in ['TODO','FIXME']) if f.endswith(('.ts','.tsx'))]; sys.exit(1) if bad and print(f'ERROR: TODO/FIXME found in: {bad}') else None"

python -c "import subprocess,sys; files=[f for f in subprocess.check_output(['git','diff','--cached','--name-only'],text=True).splitlines() if f.endswith(('.ts','.tsx'))]; bad=[f for f in files if 'console.log' in open(f).read()]; sys.exit(1) if bad and print(f'ERROR: console.log found in: {bad}') else None"

postSave.description: Run Vitest on the saved file if it's a test
